actions.name: 计划审核_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 计划审核_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT distinct get_user_org(sys_user.username,Null) path
FROM sys_user where replace(CONVERT(get_user_org(username, NULL) USING utf8mb4),'\\','_') like concat("%", replace(:_user_org_path_,'\\','_'),  "%")

view.params:
SELECT ywrybiao.wfgs
FROM ywrybiao group by ywrybiao.wfgs

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.wfgs=[审批委托.所在公司])
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC
